IS_MODULE.DESCRIPTION: Define this is a module a not (To include in settings.gradle

MODULE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Include 3 value . APPLICATION for service have main method (Spring web) , LIBRARY for service not have main but have code java to config , PLATFORM for service not have code java , only config yml

SERVICE_NAME.DESCRIPTION: Define name for this module. Use this name for task and many automation gradle

BUILD_ENV.DESCRIPTION: Enable auto build .env file and it's task related to (env.gradle) in task module

BUILD_ENV_PATH_MODULE_DEPEND.DESCRIPTION: Get all relative path and module path use for docker include module and store it in .env file in module

BUILD_YML.DESCRIPTION: Enable automatic build yml for module properties

BUILD_YML_MODULE_DEPEND.DESCRIPTION: Automation combine all yml at module and all component depend and save it in build file for run or docker compose

BUILD_JAR.DESCRIPTION: Enable to inject task in file build-jar.gradle to each module enable it

README_LANGUAGE.DESCRIPTION: List language to automatic build readme.md in each language in each module

BUILD_SWAGGER.DESCRIPTION: Enable it to implement dependency and enable swagger it project (Still disable in product deploy)

BUILD_SWAGGER_LANGUAGE_LIST.DESCRIPTION: List of language to describe API in swagger

USE_DATABASE.DESCRIPTION: To check that module is using database or not

USE_DATABASE_LIST.DESCRIPTION: To define which database use in this module

IS_DATABASE_MODULE.DESCRIPTION: To defined this module is module that config database

DATABASE_MODULE_NAME.DESCRIPTION: Name of database you are using

DATABASE_MODULE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Type of database you are using

INJECT_TASK_AUTO.DESCRIPTION: Enable it to auto inject task list in file gradle/task/list/task-list.json
